qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT c.oi_concepto, c.c_concepto, c.d_concepto, t.c_tipo_concepto, t.d_tipo_concepto
FROM LIQ14_CONCEPTOS AS c, LIQ12_TIPOS_CONC AS t WHERE c.oi_tipo_concepto = t.oi_tipo_concepto AND t.c_tipo_concepto IN (\'6\', \'9\') AND
{%? (string(#SOURCE:helper-mess/rows/row/@oi_concepto)!='') {% c.oi_concepto in ({%=string(#SOURCE:helper-mess/rows/row/@oi_concepto) %}) %} {% 1 = 2 %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2

qry:define.declare: <ROWS> <ROW check="0" text="ASIGNACIONES FAMILIARES HIJOS" code="90251001" value="50" id="50"/> <ROW check="0" text="VACACIONES NO GOZADAS" code="90000056" value="56" id="56"/> <ROW check="0" text="VALES ALIMENTARIOS" code="90000060" value="60" id="60"/> <ROW check="0" text="ASIG.
